title: salix × milzii
intro: Salix × milzii is a hybrid willow plant, resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. It has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve pain, thanks to its content of salicylic acid, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of Salix × milzii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and rheumatism, as well as its use as a diuretic to help with urinary issues. Salix × milzii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
